summary: Frontend-only landing page for Gossip Cafe tested end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL. All 7 requested feature areas pass: hero load, anchored navbar smooth scroll, EN/PL/DE language switch, 7 menu category tabs with zł prices, gallery (5) + offer (6) cards render, footer links present, and the reservation form correctly emits a structured console.log, shows a success toast, and resets all fields. No backend testing performed (per request).

issues: Overline reads 'REZERWACJA — RESERVATIONS' even when language is EN — appears to be an intentional bilingual brand label, but may be inconsistent with the rest of the EN copy. Worth confirming with stakeholders.

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext is solid; lang state lives in memory only (no localStorage persistence) so the language resets to EN on page reload — consider persisting if intended.

Reservation form has no client-side validation beyond browser-native required attributes (date/guests have no required enforcement on Popover/Select). Submitting without picking a date results in an empty 'date' field in the console payload — acceptable for MVP but worth tightening.
Reservation.jsx logs raw user input to console — fine for MVP but should be removed/guarded before any production deploy.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes as required. No oversized files (>700 lines). Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env (unused here since no backend) correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://krakow-bistro-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend-only. Verified via Playwright with console-log capture. Reservation submit emits a single console.log line starting with 'Gossip Cafe — New Reservation Request:' containing {name, phone, date(yyyy-MM-dd), time, guests, notes, submittedAt}. Toast renders inside [data-sonner-toast] container at bottom-right. Calendar uses 'button[name="day"]:not([disabled])' selectors. 7 menu tabs (menu-tab-0..6), 5 gallery (gallery-image-0..4), 6 offer cards (offer-card-0..5). Language switch keys: lang-btn-en/pl/de.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all flows functioning as designed.
